title: MIDWIFERY CARE - 211info
text: ROGUE BIRTH CENTER MIDWIFERY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers preconception counseling and individualized prenatal care; able to co-care for some health issues and can take late transfers with previous prenatal care established. Team of midwives and students serve families in a free-standing birth center and at home births, including water births. Postpartum care offered at birthing center or at patient's home and continues for both mother and baby for up to 6 weeks. Postpartum care includes newborn exam/screening, hearing screening, weight-checks, any lab work needed for mother, and can end with a well-woman exam. 1453 Redwood Circle Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 916-8333 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 916-8333 Main phone Main phone (541) 916-8333 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accept OHP, cash, check, credit cards, and payment plans available DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Curry, Jackson, and Josephine Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Redwood Highway past Gooseberries, turn on Redwood Circle. Located behind Sweet Tea Express parking lot. Services: Delivery/Childbirth Midwifery Postpartum Care Preconception Care Prenatal Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - NATURAL CHILDBIRTH AND BREASTFEEDING CLASS MUTUAL SUPPORT - MOM AND ME SUPPORT GROUP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE BIRTH CENTER
